_comment: Opt-in list of accounts to COMMENT under (not just retweet) -- the one deliberate exception to the 'never auto-reply under other accounts' rule, so start small. 'user_id' is the numeric X user ID (not the @handle) -- resolve it once with GET /2/users/by/username/:username and paste it here, same as config/accounts.json. An entry with a blank user_id (or enabled=false) does nothing at all. 'times_per_day' is a hard per-account cap. Watch reply quality for a while before adding more accounts.
